Title: Summerfest attendance up 8.3% this year

URL Source: https://biztimes.com/summerfest-attendance-up-8-3-this-year/

Published Time: 2025-07-15T19:29:26+00:00

Markdown Content:
# Summerfest attendance up 8.3% this year

[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/BizTimesMedia "Facebook")[Linkedin](https://www.linkedin.com/company/biztimes "Linkedin")[X](https://twitter.com/biztimesmedia "X")[Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/user/BizTimes "Youtube")

[![Image 5: Gerald Nell - 2026.04 - ROS - 970x250 - Pewaukee Office 2](https://cdn.broadstreetads.com/assets/7fa7c957-8ae9-4699-9ec7-1de3107763c0.jpg)](https://www.geraldnell.com/buildings.php?utm_source=BizTimes%2520Media&utm_medium=banner "Gerald Nell - 2026.04 - ROS - 970x250 - Pewaukee Office 2")

[Sports & Entertainment](https://biztimes.com/category/industries/sports-entertainment/)

# Summerfest attendance up 8.3% this year

[![Image 6: Andrew Weiland](https://assets.biztimes.com/uploads/2019/05/AndrewWeiland-WEB-2017-150x150.jpg)](https://biztimes.com/author/aweiland/ "Andrew Weiland")

By[Andrew Weiland](https://biztimes.com/author/aweiland/)

Jul 15, 2025 2:29 pm

Share

[Email](mailto:?subject=Summerfest%20attendance%20up%208.3%%20this%20year&body=https://biztimes.com/summerfest-attendance-up-8-3-this-year/ "Email")[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fbiztimes.com%2Fsummerfest-attendance-up-8-3-this-year%2F "Facebook")[X](https://x.com/intent/post?text=Summerfest+attendance+up+8.3%25+this+year&url=https%3A%2F%2Fbiztimes.com%2Fsummerfest-attendance-up-8-3-this-year%2F&via=biztimesmedia "X")[Linkedin](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https://biztimes.com/summerfest-attendance-up-8-3-this-year/&title=Summerfest+attendance+up+8.3%25+this+year "Linkedin")[Copy URL](https://biztimes.com/summerfest-attendance-up-8-3-this-year/ "Copy URL")[Order Reprint](https://biztimes.com/reprints/)

[](https://biztimes.com/summerfest-attendance-up-8-3-this-year/# "More")

![Image 7: Summerfest 2025](https://assets.biztimes.com/2025/06/Sfest-crowd-couture-baird-1068x601.jpg)

Day one of Summerfest 2025 draws crowds. 

_[Subscribe to BizTimes Daily](https://biztimes.com/email/?esrc=articletop) – Local news about the people, companies and issues that impact business in Milwaukee and Southeast Wisconsin._

Learn more about:

[Milwaukee World Festival Inc.](https://biztimes.com/company/milwaukee-world-festival-inc/)[Summerfest](https://biztimes.com/company/summerfest/)[Sarah Pancheri](https://biztimes.com/people/sarah-pancheri/)

[![Image 8: Sarah Smith Pancheri, president of Milwaukee World Festival](https://assets.biztimes.com/2022/08/Summerfest_20220727_0041-300x300.jpg)](https://assets.biztimes.com/2022/08/Summerfest_20220727_0041.jpg)

Sarah Smith Pancheri, president and CEO of Milwaukee World Festival. (Photo credit: Andrew Feller)

Attendance for the 2025 edition of **Summerfest** was up 8.3% to 602,231, **Milwaukee World Festival Inc.** announced today.

“As an independent music festival,Summerfest delivers a one-of-a-kind experience, bringing fans together to enjoy incredible performances and Milwaukee’s vibrant energy,” said **Sarah Pancheri**, president and CEO of Milwaukee World Festival, Inc., who took over as the leader of the organization last year, following the retirement of **Don Smiley**. “We want to thank the artists, sponsors, vendors and fans that supported us this year.”

However, despite the attendance increase this year, Summerfest attendance still lags behind pre-pandemic levels. This year’s attendance was 16.1% short of Summerfest of 2019, which had attendance of 718,144.

- Advertisement -

[![Image 9: Landmark - 2025.10 - ROS - 970x250 - Treasury Management](https://cdn.broadstreetads.com/assets/da309e1f-d989-458f-b40b-7ff389fa0785.gif)](https://landmarkcu.com/treasury-management?utm_source=BizTimes&utm_medium=banner&utm_campaign=TreasuryManagement&utm_content=970x250_2025_Business_BizTimes_TreasuryManagement_Business_NA_GIF_000000-000000000-Business "Landmark - 2025.10 - ROS - 970x250 - Treasury Management")

The best post-pandemic Summerfest attendance year was 2023, with 624,407, which was 3.7% higher than this year’s attendance.

Hozier, The Killers, and Benson Boone were the top draws at Summerfest 2025 with sold-out shows at the American Family Insurance Amphitheater.

However, the final day of Summerfest 2025 was [**marred by multiple fights**](https://www.wisn.com/article/police-eject-21-from-summerfest-as-teen-fights-prompt-security-review/65324252)and police ejected 21 individuals.

- Advertisement -

[![Image 10](https://cdn.broadstreetads.com/uploads/cc3be377-5423-484e-828f-3451f9f4c8bb.jpeg) **Why a new cargo hub at Milwaukee's Airport could drive growth in Wisconsin** A new cargo development at Milwaukee Mitchell International Airport (MKE) could have statewide implications far beyond the air cargo industry, posing](https://ad.broadstreetads.com/click/1366980/c925030/z184041?preview=true&preview=true)

Milwaukee World Festival said it will continue to schedule Summerfest as a three weekend event, as it has in recent years. Summerfest of 2026 will be held on June 19-21, June 26-28 and July 3-5.

Here are the total attendance figures for the most recent years of Summerfest:

*   2025 – 602,231
*   2024 – 555,925
*   2023 – 624,407
*   2022 – 445,611
*   2021 – 409,386
*   2020 – canceled
*   2019 – 718,144
*   2018 – 766,192
*   2017 – 831, 769
*   2016 – 804,116
*   2015 – 772,000

*   [Terms](https://www.iubenda.com/terms-and-conditions/39068995)
*   [Privacy](https://biztimes.com/summerfest-attendance-up-8-3-this-year/#)
*   [Cookies](https://biztimes.com/summerfest-attendance-up-8-3-this-year/#)
*   [Notice at Collection](https://biztimes.com/summerfest-attendance-up-8-3-this-year/#)

 [caption id="attachment_554348" align="alignleft" width="300"]![Image 12: Sarah Smith Pancheri, president of Milwaukee World Festival](https://assets.biztimes.com/2022/08/Summerfest_20220727_0041-300x300.jpg) Sarah Smith Pancheri, president and CEO of Milwaukee World Festival. (Photo credit: Andrew Feller)[/caption] Attendance for the 2025 edition of **Summerfest** was up 8.3% to 602,231, **Milwaukee World Festival Inc.** announced today. “As an independent music festival,Summerfest delivers a one-of-a-kind experience, bringing fans together to enjoy incredible performances and Milwaukee’s vibrant energy,” said **Sarah Pancheri**, president and CEO of Milwaukee World Festival, Inc., who took over as the leader of the organization last year, following the retirement of **Don Smiley**. “We want to thank the artists, sponsors, vendors and fans that supported us this year." However, despite the attendance increase this year, Summerfest attendance still lags behind pre-pandemic levels. This year’s attendance was 16.1% short of Summerfest of 2019, which had attendance of 718,144. The best post-pandemic Summerfest attendance year was 2023, with 624,407, which was 3.7% higher than this year’s attendance. Hozier, The Killers, and Benson Boone were the top draws at Summerfest 2025 with sold-out shows at the American Family Insurance Amphitheater. However, the final day of Summerfest 2025 was [**marred by multiple fights**](https://www.wisn.com/article/police-eject-21-from-summerfest-as-teen-fights-prompt-security-review/65324252)and police ejected 21 individuals. Milwaukee World Festival said it will continue to schedule Summerfest as a three weekend event, as it has in recent years. Summerfest of 2026 will be held on June 19-21, June 26-28 and July 3-5. Here are the total attendance figures for the most recent years of Summerfest: 
*   2025 – 602,231
*   2024 – 555,925
*   2023 – 624,407
*   2022 – 445,611
*   2021 – 409,386
*   2020 – canceled
*   2019 – 718,144
*   2018 – 766,192
*   2017 – 831, 769
*   2016 – 804,116
*   2015 – 772,000
